channel.title: Ollama on ExitCode0
channel.description: Recent content in Ollama on ExitCode0

item.title: Understanding Pi Agent's Extension Model: Context Files, Skills, and TypeScript Extensions
item.description: Pi Agent has four distinct layers for customisation - context files, prompt templates, skills, and TypeScript extensions. Here's what each one does, when to reach for it, and how they compare to Claude Code's model.

item.title: Running Ollama in a Proxmox LXC with NVIDIA GPU Passthrough
item.description: A complete guide to setting up Ollama inside a Proxmox LXC container with full NVIDIA GPU passthrough, Tailscale access, and Open WebUI — run your own local LLMs with GPU acceleration.
